section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout (one asset per column), section header 'M&R'. Four asset columns, all SP, none marked EIF. Selections are black-filled cells. The Transaction row is a continuous black band across all four columns (no letter visible) - treated as a divider/redaction, transaction recorded null. Celgene shows value A:None with Capital Gains income (consistent with a position sold during the year).

uncertainties.read: Transaction row black-filled across all 4 columns
uncertainties.note: black band with no P/S/E letter; treated as formatting divider, recorded null for all assets
